title: Product Trainer
description:
Job Description:


Training and Content Development:

  • Develop a training framework of commissioned systems to guide the training development.
  • Develop training contents (such as manuals, presentations, e-learning modules, and/or videos) for a learner to acquire knowledge and skills confidently.
  • Develop and optimise a training programme based on the learners’ requirements.
  • Maintain current and forecast training calendars, especially for customers requiring regular training tasks.
  • Conduct periodic updates to ensure effective, efficient, and safe training activities.
  • Provide learner feedback to improve a learner’s performance.
  • Track learner attendance records during the course.

Training Delivery

  • Conduct system and maintenance training (theory and practical) externally for customers based locally and overseas.
  • Coordinate at functional levels (such as resources and systems) to optimise the conduct of training in a sustainable manner.
  • Explain and demonstrate training task (theory and practical) effectively, and safely.
  • Schedule system and maintenance training (theory and practical) internally for functional employees based locally and overseas.

Assessment & Evaluation

  • Digitalise all systems and maintenance assessments.
  • Develop and conduct all assessments, theory and practical, online.
  • Maintain training records and qualifications.
  • Present training evaluation at the individual and course levels.


Requirements:

  • At least 3 years of training experience in a related industry preferred.
  • Possessing relevant trainer qualifications [such as Advanced Certificate in Learning & Performance (ACLP) or Methods of instructions (MOI)].
  • Ability to simplify complex structures/issues for effective communications.
  • Ability to communicate and converse effectively in English during the training tasks.
  • Required to support, lead, and/or participate in broader roles to gain first access to system knowledge.
  • Open to travelling overseas for training.

postedCompany.description: TRD is a Singapore registered company which was set up in 2011 to initially provide consultancy and market development services for security and defense industries. Since 2015, TRD has been engaging deeply into the design, development and supply of stand-alone products and integrated systems to address the growing threat represented by the proliferation of drones. TRD is also representing several international Defense suppliers for jointly providing solutions to ASEAN customers. TRD comprises defense and security subject matters expert with decades of technical and military experience. Such expertise allows TRD to develop modular, integrated and proven solution, thanks to the support of a dedicated team of competent and innovative system engineers, production managers and after-sales support managers. TRD is proud today to count among its customers most of the ASEAN countries, countries in the Middle-East and Europe. TRD is proud to achieve ISO 9001:2015 standard on our Anti-Drone stand-alone and integrated systems in 2019.
postedCompany.name: TRD SYSTEMS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D21 Upper Bukit Timah, Clementi Park, Ulu Pandan
